predicates.name: is_surviving_spouse_of
predicates.description: The first person is the surviving spouse of the second (deceased) person.

predicates.name: leaves_descendants_or_adopted
predicates.description: The deceased leaves descendants, adopted children, or descendants of adopted children.

predicates.name: leaves_ascending_or_close_collateral_relatives
predicates.description: The deceased leaves relatives in the ascending line or close collateral relatives (and no descendants or adopted children).

predicates.name: leaves_other_or_no_heirs
predicates.description: The deceased leaves other heirs or no heirs at all (no descendants, no ascending or close collateral relatives).

predicates.name: is_common_property
predicates.description: The asset is part of the common property of the deceased person and their spouse.

predicates.name: is_exclusively_undivided_co_owned_between_spouses
predicates.description: The asset is exclusively held in undivided co-ownership between the deceased and the surviving spouse.

predicates.name: is_own_property_of_deceased
predicates.description: The asset belongs to the own property of the deceased person.

predicates.name: subject_to_legal_reversion_right
predicates.description: The asset is subject to the right of legal reversion referred to in article 4.24 or 4.25 in the estate of the deceased.

predicates.name: deed_or_will_excludes_usufruct_on_reversion_asset
predicates.description: The deed of gift or will provides otherwise regarding the usufruct of the asset subject to legal reversion for the deceased.

predicates.name: acquires_usufruct_of_entire_estate
predicates.description: The surviving spouse (first arg) acquires the usufruct of the entire estate of the deceased (second arg).

predicates.name: acquires_full_ownership_of_first_to_die_share
predicates.description: The surviving spouse (first arg) acquires full ownership of the deceased's (second arg) share in common property and exclusively undivided co-owned property.

predicates.name: acquires_usufruct_of_own_property
predicates.description: The surviving spouse (first arg) acquires the usufruct of the remaining own property of the deceased (second arg).

predicates.name: acquires_usufruct_of_reversion_asset
predicates.description: The surviving spouse (first arg) acquires the usufruct of the asset (second arg) subject to legal reversion in the estate of the deceased (third arg).

predicates.name: acquires_full_ownership_of_entire_estate
predicates.description: The surviving spouse (first arg) acquires full ownership of the entire estate of the deceased (second arg).
